summary: End-to-End Notification System tested thoroughly. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests PASSING - all five trigger paths (post_like, post_comment, new_message, admin_report, follow) correctly create notifications in MongoDB, and GET /api/notifications/history + POST /api/notifications/mark-read both work. Frontend: bell icon + red unread badge visible after login, NotificationCenter modal opens with filter tabs and 'Mark all as read' button, and real notifications generated during backend tests are displayed correctly with proper icons (heart for likes, chatbubble for comments).

minor.issue: Endpoint uses multipart Form data instead of JSON. This is internal-only consideration; not a user-facing bug. Test had to be adapted.

Endpoint is a toggle (follow/unfollow on same POST). There is no separate /unfollow route - 404. Works as designed but slightly unusual REST shape. Notification is correctly fired on the follow action and NOT on the unfollow action.

ui_bugs.issue: Only 5 filter tabs visible (All, Unread, Alerts, Social, Badges). Spec calls for 7 tabs including 'Messages' and 'Likes'. Messages and Likes tabs are MISSING from the filter row.

new_message notifications display the default bell icon instead of the spec-required mail/envelope icon. admin_report notifications also use default bell instead of flag icon. Only post_like (heart, red) and post_comment (chatbubble, cyan) render with correct distinct icons.

Persistent from iteration 80: data-testid attributes are passed as JSX props but React Native Web requires testID prop. Zero data-testid attributes are present in the rendered DOM, which blocks automated testing using stable selectors. Tests had to rely on text content + viewport coordinates.

issues: Notification titles/bodies are still rendered in French ('Nouveau follower', 'Signalement de post', 'Nouveau commentaire', 'Nouveau like', 'Nouveau message') even when UI language is set to English. Notification template strings on the backend are hard-coded French.

action_items: Localize notification title/body strings on the backend (server.py send_notification_to_user callers) - currently always French regardless of recipient preferred language.
Add 'Messages' and 'Likes' filter tabs to NotificationCenter.tsx filters array so they match spec.
Fix icon map in NotificationCenter.tsx: ensure new_message -> mail icon, admin_report -> flag icon. Currently fall back to generic bell.
Convert all data-testid props to testID in React Native components so the test infra can target them on web (carry-over from iteration 80).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: send_notification_to_user is wired correctly into like/comment/message/report/follow paths and writes to MongoDB; behavior verified end-to-end via /notifications/history.
POST /api/community/posts/{id}/like correctly skips notification when the liker IS the post author (no self-notification) - verified.
POST /api/users/{id}/follow is a toggle; consider exposing a separate DELETE /api/users/{id}/follow or POST /unfollow to avoid surprising clients (currently /unfollow returns 404).
Notification template strings are hard-coded French. Move to i18n catalog keyed by recipient locale.

/api/notifications/history response shape is {success, data: [...]} which differs from typical list-style endpoints; document this on the frontend client (vipAPI.getNotificationHistory) and update OpenAPI.
test_credentials: Super Admin: jcuradeau.7@gmail.com / Crypto2026!. Apple Review: applereview@mentova.com / AppleReview2026!. Admin user_id=3022d23d-11a1-4fbb-849a-0cddb379d65f, Apple user_id=ee1ba863-ece8-412a-8ac2-3e9b1d532747.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates a TEST_post_* community post owned by admin if no admin-authored post exists; subsequent like/comment notifications target it. Apple sends TEST_msg_* messages and TEST_comment_* comments. No teardown is performed - cleanup may be needed by admin if test data accumulates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system is end-to-end verified for all 5 triggers. The /api/notifications/history endpoint returns {success: true, data: [...]} (not a bare list). The /api/users/{id}/follow endpoint is a TOGGLE - call it twice in a row to ensure 'followed' state (and a notification on the second call). POST /api/community/posts expects multipart Form data, not JSON. To exercise the UI: login at /login, click Sign In, then click the bell icon at top-right (≈x=1855, y=62 at 1920x1080) - the modal opens with Notifications header, 5 filter tabs, and Mark all as read button.
rca of the issue: No bug remained after my session. Initial test failures were caused by my test code's assumptions about response shape (notifications/history returns {success, data}, not a list) and the follow endpoint behavior (toggle on same POST, no /unfollow route). Updating the test fixtures resolved all assertions and 7/7 tests now pass. Remaining items (i18n strings, missing filter tabs, missing icons for some types, data-testid vs testID) are minor frontend/backend feature gaps documented as action items for the main agent.
